name: nextjs-patterns
description: Next.js App Router patterns, server components, data fetching, middleware, and deployment

entries.title: App Router Layout & Page Structure
entries.content: Next.js 13+ App Router uses file-system routing. layout.tsx wraps children persistently, page.tsx renders route content. loading.tsx shows Suspense fallback. error.tsx handles errors. not-found.tsx for 404. Route groups with (name) organize without affecting URL.

entries.title: Server Actions for Form Mutations
entries.content: Server Actions run on the server, invoked from client forms. Use 'use server' directive. Works without API routes. Supports revalidation, redirects, cookies.

entries.title: Route Handlers (API Routes)
entries.content: Route handlers in app/api/ dir. Export GET, POST, PUT, DELETE functions. Use NextRequest/NextResponse. Support streaming, CORS, cookies, headers.

entries.title: Middleware for Auth & Redirects
entries.content: middleware.ts at project root runs before every request. Use for auth checks, redirects, geolocation, A/B testing. Runs on Edge runtime. Use matcher for path filtering.

entries.title: Server Components Data Fetching
entries.content: Server Components fetch data directly with async/await. No useEffect needed. Use fetch() with caching options: force-cache (default), no-store, revalidate. Parallel fetching with Promise.all.

entries.title: Streaming SSR with Suspense
entries.content: Stream server-rendered HTML progressively. Wrap slow components in Suspense with loading.tsx or inline fallbacks. Improves TTFB and perceived performance.
